deliverables: Follow-up email with options and timeline (from Vrijen)

ctas.verbatim: Yeah, that would be awesome... I'm going to talk to Logan. I can get you a quick proposal.

ctas.text: Schedule a follow-up in ~2 weeks (coordinate Flex Fridays)
ctas.verbatim: ...maybe in two weeks I can bring my co founder Logan on as well... the next one I have is October 17th...

decisions.speaker: Rajesh Nerlikar
decisions.decision: Target buyer focus on startups/scale-ups; avoid Fortune 500 for now
decisions.verbatim: I would probably steer clear of Fortune 500... startup scale-up is the most interesting market.

speaker_quotes: Act like a career agent for individuals.
You only pay for the candidates you accept into your pipeline.
Steer clear of Fortune 500 right now.
First candidate is free — like a free trial.
summary: Rajesh and Vrijen discuss Careerspan's community-led talent model, advisory involvement, GTM focus on startups/scale-ups, candidate-first positioning, and next steps: proposal + follow-up with Logan in ~2 weeks.
